description_long: This is a small, single-engine light airplane with a high-wing configuration and a fixed tricycle landing gear. The fuselage is slender and streamlined, painted primarily in red and white, with the engine mounted at the nose and a two-blade propeller. The wings are straight and extend widely from the top of the fuselage, providing stability and lift. The tail section features a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, all accented in red. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage, likely accommodating one or two seats, and appears to be enclosed with a clear canopy.
description: A small, red and white high-wing light airplane with a single nose-mounted engine, fixed tricycle landing gear, and a conventional tail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide high-mounted wings, nose-mounted propeller, and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the straight wing, engine placement, and the red and white color scheme along the fuselage and tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail assembly with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, as well as the full wingspan.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the engine, cockpit, and tail details with visible landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight configuration with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit likely configured for one or two seats with a clear canopy.
